name: DarthClaw
description: Verifiable randomness (VRF) service for AI agents. Cryptographically provable randomness for gaming, NFT reveals, lotteries, and agent decision-making. x402 payments, $0.005/request.

services.name: vrf-api
services.description: Verifiable randomness API with x402 payments. Supports single, range (min/max), and batch (1-100) modes.

services.name: vrf-instructions
services.description: Machine-readable integration guide for agents. Free.

services.name: mcp
services.description: MCP server manifest for agent-native randomness tools.

services.name: vrf-frame
services.description: Farcaster Frame for interactive dice rolling.
